name: Underlord
description: Nothing can stop us. Nothing can slow our march. And when we have arrived, all will burn.

abilities.name: Invading Force
abilities.description: Grants his allied heroes movement speed bonus and incoming damage reduction once their teleportation completes. Grants allied heroes a greater bonus upon warping through the Fiend's Gate.

abilities.name: Abyssal Horde
abilities.description: The Fiend's Gate additionally summons uncontrollable demonic minions on the portal that Underlord teleports to. Burns an enemy's mana on each attack and deals damage equal to a percentage of the mana burnt.

abilities.name: Firestorm
abilities.description: Applies a debuff per interval that deals additional damage over time corresponding to the debuff-affected units' max health. Both and the are immune to the max health as damage component. However, other ability effects still apply.

abilities.name: Atrophy Aura
abilities.description: The bonus attack damage granted is less effective per creep death. grants Underlord's attack cleave damage with increased range per stack.

abilities.name: Fiend's Gate
abilities.description: Opens one portal next to Underlord and another portal in the target location. Both portals have to be at least a certain distance away from each other. Heroes can channel a portal to teleport to the other side. This unit is completely immune to all status effects and damage sources. It neither can be unit-targeted by attacks nor abilities and has its health bar hidden.
